details.test: Task 1: Add 3 Grade 3 fraction worksheets under 5 to cart
Task 2: Build classroom decor order analogue with two items
Task 3: Compare two products and add better one to cart
Task 4: Create teacher account and favorite a resource
Task 5: Purchase digital resource analogue between 3-10
Task 6: Order 6 units of highest-rated product under 15
Task 7: Add budget item, apply TEACH10, select standard shipping, proceed to payment
Task 8: Choose membership plan with lower per-month cost and start signup
Task 9: Save highest-priced cart item for later so only two remain active
